original: A simple-looking pill with white and orange stripes produced by Xenogen Biotech, this pill is loaded with a new, proprietary blend of nanomachines programmed to rebuild your body in the ideal image of a cross between red and gold myrmedions, as envisioned by Doctor Byron McAllister.
